name: PUBLIC JOINT STOCK COMPANY GAZP
summary: Public Joint Stock Company Gazprom is a global energy company focused on geological exploration, production, transmission, storage, processing and sale of gas, gas condensate and oil, sale of gas as a vehicle fuel, as well as generation and marketing of heat and electric power. The company is headquartered in Moscow, Russia. It plays a crucial role in supplying natural gas to Europe and other regions.
